name: Bubbe's Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: Water (10-12 quarts) to cover and bring to a boil
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in the pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
2. Skim off any impurities from the surface of the soup when it comes to a boil, then add the chopped vegetables: onion, celery, parsnip, sweet potato, carrot, dill, and parsley. Reduce heat to maintain a gentle simmer for about two hours. The soup is best enjoyed hot or at room temperature.
3. To serve, strain the soup through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot, reserving the liquid in the mesh bag for added flavor if desired. Serve with crusty bread, rice, noodles, or matzo balls on top.
